identity.description: A clean, whitespace-dominant design that emphasizes craftsmanship and Finnish quality. Uses a specific blue theme against stark white/off-white backgrounds.

usage.slogan: Barlow Condensed, font-black, uppercase, tracking-wide, text-primary

colors.rules: Use primary blue for CTAs, icons, and key accents. Keep backgrounds white or very light grey (zinc-50). Avoid gradients. Use high contrast.

layout.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-8 to p-24 for section padding. Gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
layout.grid_system: Use CSS Grid. Services: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3. References: Masonry or grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3.
layout.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for hover states. Avoid heavy drop shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 border border-gray-100 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm h-12

hero.treatment: Use gentle overlay if text is over image, or use split layout.

textures.name: plaster_texture
textures.usage: Subtle background for 'Quality' section or Footer

assets.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Thin stroke (1.5px) to match minimal aesthetic.
assets.logos: Use text for partner logos if PNGs not available, styled in grayscale opacity-50.

motion.scroll: Parallax on hero image if possible

sections.hero: Focus on high quality and leadership in the field.
sections.references: Showcase: Mehiläinen Ympyrätalo, Crowne Plaza Hotel, Ressun lukio, Jumbo Stockmann, Myllypuro koulu.
sections.guarantee: Customer satisfaction guarantee, flexible, turnkey service.
sections.contact: Form with Name, Email, Phone, Message.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Sticky' Navbar that becomes glassmorphic on scroll.
Ensure the Blue (#0056D2) is used strategically for 'Call to Actions' and 'Highlights' only. Do not overuse.
The 'References' section should be a highlight - use a clean grid with high-quality placeholder images provided.
Create a 'Quote' or 'Estimate' request form as the primary conversion goal.
Ensure the site is mobile-responsive with appropriate padding on small screens.
